mapper.select:
select DOMAIN_ID ,DOMAIN_NM ,DOMAIN_GRP_NM ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,DOMAIN_DESC ,DATA_TYPE ,DATA_LEN ,DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,DATA_UNIT ,STOR_FMT ,EXPR_FMT_LST ,ALLOW_VAL_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_DOMAIN where 1=1
AND DOMAIN_NM like '%' || #{schNm} || '%'
AND APRV_YN = #{schAprvYn}
order by DOMAIN_NM

select DOMAIN_ID ,DOMAIN_NM ,DOMAIN_GRP_NM ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,DOMAIN_DESC ,DATA_TYPE ,DATA_LEN ,DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,DATA_UNIT ,STOR_FMT ,EXPR_FMT_LST ,ALLOW_VAL_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_DOMAIN where DOMAIN_NM = #{domainNm}

select DOMAIN_ID ,DOMAIN_NM ,DOMAIN_GRP_NM ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,DOMAIN_DESC ,DATA_TYPE ,DATA_LEN ,DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,DATA_UNIT ,STOR_FMT ,EXPR_FMT_LST ,ALLOW_VAL_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_DOMAIN where DOMAIN_CLSF_NM = #{domainClsfNm} order by DOMAIN_NM
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TB_DOMAIN WHERE DOMAIN_ID IN
#{item.id}
mapper.select: select DOMAIN_GRP_ID as id ,DOMAIN_GRP_NM as domainGrpNm ,COMM_STND_YN as coimmStndYn ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId from TB_DOMAIN_GRP order by DOMAIN_GRP_NM
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TB_DOMAIN_GRP WHERE DOMAIN_GRP_ID IN
#{item.id}
mapper.select: select DOMAIN_CLSF_ID as id ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM as domainClsfNm ,DOMAIN_GRP_NM as domainGrpNm ,COMM_STND_YN as coimmStndYn ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId from TB_DOMAIN_CLSF order by DOMAIN_CLSF_NM

select DOMAIN_CLSF_ID as id ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM as domainClsfNm ,DOMAIN_GRP_NM as domainGrpNm ,COMM_STND_YN as coimmStndYn ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId from TB_DOMAIN_CLSF where DOMAIN_CLSF_NM like #{domainClsfNm} order by DOMAIN_CLSF_NM

select DOMAIN_CLSF_ID as id ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM as domainClsfNm ,DOMAIN_GRP_NM as domainGrpNm ,COMM_STND_YN as coimmStndYn ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId from TB_DOMAIN_CLSF where DOMAIN_GRP_NM = #{domainGrpNm} order by DOMAIN_CLSF_NM
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TB_DOMAIN_CLSF WHERE DOMAIN_CLSF_ID IN
#{item.id}
